framework.ui.tips_this_is_a_replacement_:
### Tips
* This is a replacement table for OCR recognition issues
* Double-click a cell to edit
* Fill the fields above and click Add to create a new replacement rule
* Wrong Text: OCR-recognized incorrect text. If missing, enable OCR result display in Settings
* Correct Text: expected in-game text
* To delete, select a row first and then click Delete
